programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The sparkling notes of a trumpet fanfare and the familiar logo of the sun alert viewers that it's time for CBS's Sunday morning staple. Journalist Jane Pauley helms the show, taking over hosting duties from Charles Osgood, who spent 22 years on the job. A morning talk show, this program airs at a different pace and focuses much of its attention on the performing arts. After a quick update of the day's news and national weather, correspondents offer longer-length segments on a variety of topics, from architecture to ballet to music to pop culture to politics.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Madea Goes To Jail
programme.desc: After a high-speed freeway chase puts Madea (TYLER PERRY) in front of the judge, her reprieve is short-lived as anger management issues get the best of her and land her in jail. A gleeful Joe (TYLER PERRY) couldn't be happier at Madea's misfortune. But Madea's eccentric family members the Browns (DAVID and TAMALA MANN) rally behind her, lending their special "country" brand of support. Meanwhile, Assistant District Attorney Joshua Hardaway (DEREK LUKE) is on the fast track to career success. But Hardaway lands a case too personal to handle - defending young prostitute and former drug addict Candace Washington (KESHIA KNIGHT PULLIAM) - and asks his fiancée and fellow ADA Linda Holmes (ION OVERMAN) to fill in on his behalf. When Candace ends up in jail, Madea befriends the young woman, protecting her in a "motherly" way as only Madea can.

programme.title: Paradise Hills
programme.desc: Uma is a young woman who wakes up in an apparently idyllic reform school for young ladies. But a dark secret lies within its walls.

programme.title: Flatliners (1990)
programme.desc: Are you afraid to die? Kiefer Sutherland isn't. He's an ambitious, charismatic medical student who persuades classmates Julia Roberts and Kevin Bacon to take part in a reckless experiment. To see if there is life after death, they will kill themselves: temporarily shut down ("flatline") their heartland brain functions to briefly experience clinical death. After Sutherland survives the first experiment, the others flatline for increasingly longer intervals. But their horror begins when they realize that although they've come back alive... they haven't come back alone. FLATLINERS is a chilling suspense thriller of obsession, fear and redemption that will take you across the line to a place where terror lives forever.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story
programme.desc: A wild and wicked send-up of every musical biopic ever made, WALK HARD: THE DEWEY COX STORY is gut-busting proof that when it comes to hard rocking, living and laughing, a hard man is good to find.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: An American master chemist plans to score big on a once-in-a-lifetime drug deal. All does not go as planned and he is soon entangled in a web of deceit.

programme.title: The Proposition
programme.desc: In the harsh, unforgiving landscape of the Outback, Charlie Burns is presented with an impossible proposition by local law enforcer Captain Stanley: the only way to save younger brother Mikey from the gallows is to track down and kill Arthur, his psychotic older brother. Meanwhile Captain Stanley is desperate to shield his innocent wife from the brutalities of their new surroundings, having given up their comfortable life in England. An uneasy sense of foreboding grows as each character faces a punishing moral dilemma that leads inexorably to a devastating climax...

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Madea Goes To Jail
programme.desc: After a high-speed freeway chase puts Madea (TYLER PERRY) in front of the judge, her reprieve is short-lived as anger management issues get the best of her and land her in jail. A gleeful Joe (TYLER PERRY) couldn't be happier at Madea's misfortune. But Madea's eccentric family members the Browns (DAVID and TAMALA MANN) rally behind her, lending their special "country" brand of support. Meanwhile, Assistant District Attorney Joshua Hardaway (DEREK LUKE) is on the fast track to career success. But Hardaway lands a case too personal to handle - defending young prostitute and former drug addict Candace Washington (KESHIA KNIGHT PULLIAM) - and asks his fiancée and fellow ADA Linda Holmes (ION OVERMAN) to fill in on his behalf. When Candace ends up in jail, Madea befriends the young woman, protecting her in a "motherly" way as only Madea can.

programme.title: Paradise Hills

After a failed mission, deep-cover operative Wheeler (Van Damme) is imprisoned in a CIA black site on a submarine. The CIA agents will to go to any lengths to get information from Wheeler—but nothing can prepare them for the storm of violence that erupts when he joins forces with a fellow prisoner (Lundgren) as deadly as he is mysterious.

programme.desc: Lara Croft sets out on a quest to save Pandora's box from landing into the wrong hands. Join her as she races through furious hand-to-hand battles, blazing shoot-outs and breathtaking sky-diving escapes to try to save the ancient artifact.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (2011)
programme.desc: A gifted ensemble cast sparks this bold retelling of Alexander Dumas' classic tale of friendship and heroism. With Christoph Waltz as wily Cardinal Richelieu.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Exploring lost empires and finding priceless treasures... it's all in a day's work for Lara Croft. Though, a secret from her father's past is about to lead Lara to her greatest challenge.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: An embittered Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteader's wife and her son back to safety after her cowardly husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, the scout stays on to help for a while and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After hired hand Tom Chaney (Jeff Corey) murders the father of 14-year-old Mattie Ross (Kim Darby), she seeks vengeance and hires U.S. Marshal Rooster Cogburn (John Wayne), a man of true grit, to track Chaney into Indian territory. As the two begin their pursuit, a Texas Ranger, La Boeuf (Glen Campbell), joins the manhunt in hopes of capturing Chaney for the murder of a Texas senator and collecting a substantial reward. The three clash on their quest of bringing to justice the same man.

programme.title: Jacob's Ladder
programme.desc: After returning home from the Vietnam War, veteran Jacob Singer (Tim Robbins) struggles to maintain his sanity. Plagued by hallucinations and flashbacks, Singer rapidly falls apart as the world and people around him morph and twist into disturbing images. His girlfriend, Jezzie (Elizabeth Peña), and ex-wife, Sarah (Patricia Kalember), try to help, but to little avail. Even Singer's chiropractor friend, Louis (Danny Aiello), fails to reach him as he descends into madness.

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: When Los Angeles private eye J.J. Jake Gittes (Jack Nicholson) is hired by Evelyn Mulwray to investigate her husband's activities, he believes it's a routine infidelity case. Jake's investigation soon becomes anything but routine when he meets the real Mrs. Mulwray (Faye Dunaway) and realizes he was hired by an imposter. Mr. Mulwray's sudden death sets Gittes on a tangled trail of corruption, deceit and sinister family secrets as Evelyn's father (John Huston) becomes a suspect in the case.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A tough female ex-con and her recalcitrant 6-year-old charge go on the run from the mob.

programme.title: The Fog

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River.

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: Veteran secret agent Matt Helm (Dean Martin) is living a life of luxury when his former lover, Tina Batori (Daliah Lavi), pulls him back into action. A sinister group known as the Big O has developed a plot to start a global nuclear conflict, so the carefree, womanizing Helm must stop the scheme of mastermind Tung-Tze (Victor Buono). Joining the suave Helm on his mission is the beautiful but inept operative Gail Hendricks (Stella Stevens), along with other gorgeous ladies.

programme.title: The Mating of Millie
programme.desc: A businesswoman (Evelyn Keyes) asks a bachelor (Glenn Ford) to help her find a husband so she can adopt an orphan.

programme.title: It Happened to Jane
programme.desc: After a shipment of fresh lobsters isn't delivered on time to Jane Osgood (Doris Day), a widowed mother of two running a failing restaurant supply business in Maine, she hires her lawyer friend George Denham (Jack Lemmon) to sue the railroad company she believes is responsible for the damages. The court case generates lots of publicity and Osgood is famous. A charismatic news reporter (Steve Forrest) takes to Osgood, but that doesn't sit well with Denham, who also has eyes for her.

programme.title: The Three Stooges in Orbit
programme.desc: Three men get mixed up with some martian spies' invention.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: The Earth has stopped rotating because of a change in the planet's core temperature. To restore the normal temperature, astronauts must travel to the center and detonate a nuclear bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life on the surface.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Want someone to infiltrate a top-secret organization or steal a scientific formula that could change the world? For the right price, The Saint's your man.

programme.title: Super 8

programme.title: The Four Seasons

Old friend Nick (Len Cariou) surprises everyone when he arrives not with his wife, Anne (Sandy Dennis), but with his new girlfriend, the much younger Ginny (Bess Armstrong). The group -- all of which had grown to be good friends with Anne -- must come to terms with this unexpected development. Ultimately, they learn to accept Nick's decision, and work to welcome Ginny as a friend.

programme.title: Sweet Liberty

programme.title: Biloxi Blues
programme.desc: In this adaptation of a semi-autobiographical Neil Simon play, young Eugene Morris Jerome (Matthew Broderick) enlists in the U.S. Army at the end of World War II. He is shipped from his Brooklyn home to basic training in Biloxi, Mississippi. At boot camp, Eugene is antagonized by manic drill instructor Sergeant Toomey (Christopher Walken) and is introduced to adulthood through his experiences with a diverse group of young recruits, a Biloxi beauty, and a local prostitute.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Wear Plaid
programme.desc: When a famous cheese maker dies in a freak car crash, his daughter (Rachel Ward) is convinced that it was no accident. She thinks he was murdered for his top-secret cheese recipes. To prove her theory, she hires detective Roy Reardon (Steve Martin). His quest to find out what happened to the missing man brings him face-to-face with movie legends, actors such as Humphrey Bogart, Alan Ladd and Burt Lancaster, via footage from classic film noir and crime films.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: Danny Bryce (Jason Statham), one of the world's deadliest special-ops agents, returns from self-imposed exile after his mentor, Hunter (Robert De Niro) is captured. Danny reassembles his former team of skilled commandos to launch a rescue mission, and also to infiltrate the highly feared military unit, the British Special Air Service. The mission will not be easy, for Danny and his team must cut their way through Spike (Clive Owen) and a team of assassins known as the Feather Men.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

programme.title: When Romance Meets Destiny

But Kwang-Tae is a playboy who just sleeps around. One day, Kwang-Sik meets Yoon-Kyung for the first time in seven years and he tries to confess his feelings to her, in his own way. Similarly, Kwang-Tae meets Kyung-Jae during a marathon and he tries his own ways on her.At first Kwang-Sik still finds it very difficult to even talk to Yoon-Kyung and Kwang-Tae thinks of Kyung-Jae as yet another temporary conquest, but in each case something changes in the brothers. Will they be able to love this time?

programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: Colt .45
programme.desc: While gun purveyor Steve Farrell (Randolph Scott) shows off the latest revolver innovation, a Colt .45 repeating handgun, to Sheriff Harris (Alan Hale), outlaw prisoner Jason Brett (Zachary Scott) grabs a pair and hightails it out of town -- and the sheriff jails Farrell as a likely partner in crime. But during Farrell's incarceration, Brett goes on an unstoppable rampage. Farrell is released, and must stop the outlaw with the assistance of Walking Bear (Chief Thundercloud) and the Colt .45.

programme.title: The Gun Hawk
programme.desc: When his town-drunk father is killed by the Sully brothers, gunfighter Blaine Madden exacts his revenge but flees when the sheriff tries to arrest him.

programme.title: Rio Conchos
programme.desc: When a shipment of repeating rifles is stolen from the U.S. Cavalry, Capt. Haven (Stuart Whitman) and Sgt. Franklyn are sent to recover them and enlist the aid of an alcoholic former confederate and Indian hater, James Lassiter (Richard Boone) and a Mexican murderer, Rodriguez (Tony Franciosa). Lassiter, who owns one of the rifles, says it came from his embittered former commander Col. Pardee, while an Apache woman informant reveals that Pardee intends to sell the stolen arms to her people.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Age is no object to a lovelorn man who buys a toupee and a new set of teeth to win a dance-hall girl.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us
programme.desc: Illusionists Penn & Teller sit in the audience and watch as aspiring magicians try to impress them with a trick that the famous illusionists are unable to duplicate. If a magician successfully hoodwinks the legendary duo with a trick, be it a sleight-of-hand routine or a grand illusion, that person wins a trip to Las Vegas to perform as an opening act in Penn & Teller's show at the Rio Hotel & Casino. Actress Alyson Hannigan ("Buffy the Vampire Slayer" "How I Met Your Mother") hosts the series.

After Jung-tae's death, Hyung-joo starts acting suspiciously. Meanwhile, Ga-hyun discovers a shocking link connecting all the deaths.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.17
programme.desc: To find the suddenly vanished Yeo Wool, Kang Chi seeks out Wol Ryung in the forest. Kang Chi begins to fight Wol Ryung to save her. Meanwhile, Ja Hong Myung meets with Jo Gwan Woong, stating she wishes to buy one of his properties.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.18
programme.desc: Kang Chi, chased by ninjas, accidentally enters a room and confronts Ja Hong Myung. She is impressed by him but soon orders him to be captured, even if it means killing him. Meanwhile, Chung Jo asks Yeo Wool if she knows that Dam Pyung Joon killed Kang Chi's father.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.19
programme.desc: Ja Hong Myung is shocked to realize Kang Chi is her son. However, despite Jo Gwan Woong's persistent questioning, she pretends not to know Kang Chi. Meanwhile, Yeo Wool seeks out Bong Chool to find a way to rescue Kang Chi.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.20
programme.desc: Gu Wol Ryung suffers as a thousand-year demon. Jo Gwan Woong tells him Seo Hwa is the cause of all his misery and proposes a deal. Meanwhile, Dam Pyung Joon tells Kang Chi to remove his bracelet and defeat him in a real sword fight.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.21
programme.desc: Gu Wol Ryung, unable to remember his past, attacks Kang Chi. Ja Hong Myung is tormented as she watches the fight between her half-beast son and the divine beast Wol Ryung. Later, Ja Hong Myung takes refuge at the school and meets Yi Sun Shin.

programme.title: Kangchi, The Beginning Ep.22
programme.desc: Kang Chi visits Monk So Jung, saying he wants to find the Gu Family Book so he can grow old with Yeo Wool. So Jung reveals their fate: one of them must die. Kang Chi is shocked. Meanwhile, Tae Seo is captured and taken to Jo Gwan Woong.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.6
programme.desc: As the summer internship comes to an end, Song Ah gets some good news from one of her professors at school. She wants to share the news with Joon Young, but he doesn't respond to her message. Meanwhile, Jung Kyung tells Young In that she broke up with Hyeon Ho. After the fall semester begins, Song Ah meets Joon Young at school.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.7
programme.desc: Joon Young struggles to deal with his family's financial difficulties, his messy friendships, and his teacher's oppressive teaching style. However, he finds himself feeling comfortable and smiling whenever he is with Song Ah. Then, weird rumors about their relationship start to spread across campus.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.8
programme.desc: Song Ah becomes all too aware that people are saying Joon Young is on a different level than she is. She loses confidence and keeps trying to distance herself from Joon Young. Meanwhile, Joon Young reacts coldly when he finds Jung Kyung in front of his house. Afterward, Joon Young calls Song Ah, saying he has something to tell her.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.9
programme.desc: Song Ah and Joon Young finally realize they have mutual feelings for one another, and they have a few blissful moments together. Meanwhile, Hyeon Ho finds out about Joon Young and Song Ah's relationship and gets angry. The stress caused by his broken friendship and the seemingly perpetual cycle of preparing for competitions starts to wear on Joon Young.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.10
programme.desc: Seong Jae suggests that Joon Young talks about his family on TV for publicity. Joon Young feels both insulted and ashamed, but he holds his ground. Meanwhile, Song Ah asks Joon Young if she can visit his place. She keeps feeling Jun Kyung's presence around Joon Young both at his apartment and later on at school.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.11
programme.desc: Seong Jae finds out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and calls her for a chat. His bluntness hurts her feelings. Later on, Joon Young joins Song Ah on a sudden trip to Daejeon and shows her around the neighborhood where he grew up. After an unexpected meeting with his mother, Joon Young opens up to Song Ah about more personal matters.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.12
programme.desc: Song Ah has to look for a new accompanist when her last one quits. She asks her acquaintances for help, but she has no luck. Just then, Joon Young offers to play for her. People find out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and that Joon Young is playing for Song Ah's grad school exam. Rumors about them spread like wildfire, which makes Song Ah doubt if she made the right decision. Meanwhile, Joon Young looks for paid work performing at a concert.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: What would you do if you were confronted with death? What gives someone the strength to survive? Is it luck, chance, instinct? In a stripped-down, simple-yet-cinematic interview style, I SURVIVED allows survivors to explain, in their own words, how they overcame unbelievable circumstances -- offering insight into what got them through an experience that changed their lives forever. programme.title: Worth the Hype

programme.desc: Ready for Texas-sized flavors? Join Frankie Celenza as he eats his way through San Antonio's most iconic spots that are worth the hype. From authentic Tex-Mex to Hill Country BBQ, just add PEPSI and you've got the perfect pairing.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Fish Tacos, Bacon Burgers & Bucatini in San Francisco
programme.desc: Let's dig in. Join Frankie Celenza as he eats his way through San Francisco's most iconic spots that are worth the hype. From classic diner bites to fusion feasts to waterfront fish tacos, just add PEPSI and you've got the perfect pairing.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia: Saigon Noodles for Breakfast
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favourite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chilli Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a Father and Son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the'Land Of Eternal Spring!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Exploring The 'Wet Market' Of Nha Trang
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang- a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Chili Sauce in Hoi An
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hoi An. He visits a family who has been making chilli sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bomb shells.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Seafood With A Bang, Here In Da Nang
programme.desc: On this stop of his Vietnam journey, Luke visits the bustling seaside city of Da Nang. Join him as he visits the spectacular Dragon Bridge, looks up some succulent shimp on the beach, and stumbles upon a tiny fishing village packed with restaurants.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke visits Huê- famous for its heritage and cuisine and Con Hen Village to learn a technique for de-shelling baby clams, searches for best bowl of spicy beef noodle soup, and stops by a business where they they make turmeric vermicelli noodle salad!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Tasty Ant Eggs in Ninh Binh
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Searching For The Banh Da Noodle in Hai Phong
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delcious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delcious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vitenamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: 18 Holes: Aronimink
programme.desc: IIn this episode of B'laster's 18 Holes, hosts Jimmy Hanlin and Natalie Gulbis visit the prestigious Aronimink Golf Club in Delaware County, Pennsylvania—site of the upcoming 2026 PGA Championship. The episode offers a hole-by-hole breakdown of the challenging and historic Donald Ross–designed course, highlighting its demanding layout, signature features, and recent updates for the tournament. Championship Director Ryan Ogle joins them to discuss the significance of bringing the PGA Championship back to Aronimink for the first time in over 60 years, the anticipated economic impact for the region, and the excitement it brings to Delco.

programme.sub-title: Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer

With flintlock in hand, Steve's after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn't the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Propelled to the top of the fashion world by a photogenic gaze he calls Blue Steel, dimwitted male model Derek Zoolander (Ben Stiller) thinks he's got a fourth consecutive win as Male Model of the Year in the bag. But, when his rival, Hansel (Owen Wilson), unexpectedly takes the crown, Derek is crushed. He becomes easy prey for fashion designer Jacobim Mugatu (Will Ferrell), who signs Derek to star in his Derelicte fashion show, then brainwashes him to kill Malaysia's prime minister.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: Former models Derek Zoolander (Ben Stiller) and Hansel find themselves thrust back into the spotlight after living in seclusion for years. Invited to a major fashion event in Rome, the estranged friends are surprised to see how much the business has changed. Even more shocking is their encounter with Valentina Valencia, a special agent who needs their help. Someone is killing famous pop stars, and it's up to Derek and Hansel to help save the world's most beautiful people from a similar fate.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: Tim (Paul Rudd) a rising executive, works for a boss who hosts a monthly event in which the guest who brings the biggest buffoon gets a career boost. Though he declines the invitation at first, he changes his mind when he meets Barry (Steve Carell), a man who builds dioramas using stuffed mice. The scheme backfires when Barry's blundering good intentions send Tim's life into a downward spiral, threatening a major business deal and possibly scuttling Tim's romantic relationship.

programme.title: Tropic Thunder

programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having defeated the \"Anubis\" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterwards, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland's one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure. A disappointed Honey proves to be a very impatient patient, that is until Strawberry Shortcake and her friends work together telling stories and...

programme.desc: The Crystal Empire is in the running to host the Equestria Games.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Vampire Fruit Bats take over Sweet Apple Acres.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Seize the Wind!
programme.desc: Playmaker continues his duel with the Knight of Hanoi using the new Speed Duel rules. Playmaker is backed into a corner by the Knight's Cracking Dragon, but a data storm soon envelopes the field and Playmaker activates his Skill.

programme.title: Blippi's Summer Games
programme.desc: Blippi is back with Blippi's Sports Summer Games Movie For Kids!

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit have opened a new bakery business but a deadly murderer is targeting all the bakers in town. Wallace, meanwhile, finds true love with Piella Bakewell. Can Gromit uncover the Cereal Killer's identity before it's too late?

programme.title: Interstellar Ella
programme.desc: Interstellar Ella - Aurora Friendrealis: Angelie breaks Slippy's Jupiter gliding record, leading to a rematch. Ella's mediation fails, and they prepare to race, pondering who'll win on Jupiter. Could it be Team Angelippy?

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Timmy Time - Timmy's New Friend: When Yabba won't play with Timmy, he makes a new playmate out of modeling clay. Yabba is hurt when Timmy rejects her offers of friendship and snubs her in favour of his new Best Friend – but is an imaginary friend as much fun as a real one?

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Timmy Time - Timmy's Bouncy Friend: Timmy's new friend is a space hopper! But the space hopper is very awkward and keeps causing accidents. It's only when Harriet confiscates the space hopper that Timmy works out what it's really for: loads of bouncy fun!

programme.title: Pop Paper City
programme.desc: Pop Paper City - Friendship Parade: On today's poptastic adventure, the friends are having a parade to celebrate their friendship! The parade will finish with a big friendship dance, but Plom isn't learning the steps as quickly as everyone else. With the friendship parade about to begin, will Plom be ready to take part in the big dance?

But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Stella And Sam
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a collection of soothing artworks like Shooting Star, Owl, and much more.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: 3 Little Kittens, Roadtrip Song, 5 Cute Fruits and more fun songs to be danced to in this episode

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Enter a fun musical world with Eva Eva Yes Elly, Where's the Monster, Car Song and many more!

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.title: Let's Move!
programme.desc: ducktv's let's move! episodes are all about sports, physical exercises and outdoor adventures. This section promotes movement and motor skills, develops basic coordination and a sense of rhythm through exercising.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Indiana Pac and the Temple of Slime: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Three Sides to Every Story: When it's discovered that Eon has been vaporized, Jet-Vac interrogates his three suspects.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Days of Future Crash: To gain info about the Wumpa Islands, Eruptor and Dark Spyro travel back in time to their first encounter with Crash Bandico

programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Search for Geogan! / The Geogan Arcleon!: In search of the mysterious Geogan they witnessed the night before, the AB have a run in with Crystal Blue, Everett and Strata. / An AAAnimus Security Force transport vehicle loaded with confiscated Baku-Balls is hijacked.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising

programme.title: Street Sharks

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A prophecy wounds a hero and triggers a long-awaited Optimus-Megatron battle.

programme.desc: Dark Energon eruptions alert Autobots to a deeper threat within Earth.

programme.title: Sheep Freak
programme.desc: The dream chasers manage a challenging incursion by returning a doom sheep to the dream world, where they discover a dark force increasing in power.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.desc: Un hombre quiere hacer negocios con un traficante de órganos para salvarle la vida a su mujer, el criminal la mata por venganza y el marido después de pensarlo mucho, el marido accede a donar los órganos de su mujer, salvando varias vidas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven trabaja duramente para poder pagar su carrera. Un joven busca conquistar a la dulce chica pero ella no se muestra nada interesada.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Poncho se queda dormido en la cafetería. En sus sueños se vuelve el Poncholín colorado y el Poncho del ocho, un homenaje a los personajes, situaciones y formas cómicas del famoso autor.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una chica que es integrante de una banda se pelea con el vocalista porque sabe que es una mala persona, pero una de sus amigas lo defiende y comienza a tratarla mal hasta que ella decide dejar la banda.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Aunque la Mona Se Viste de Seda
programme.desc: Maru, sufre de depresión, además abusa de los ansiolíticos y esto provoca descuido y abandono en Nicky, su hija adolescente Nicky consume inhalables y recae gravemente su prima trata de ayudarla. Maru reconoce que ella y su hija necesitan ayuda.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer le guarda rencor a su hermana por errores del pasado, pero debido a la enfermedad de su mamá las mujeres encuentran fuerza para superar los problemas juntas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer secuestra a la nieta de un hombre mayor y le dice que debe hacer todo lo que ella le diga para pagar el dinero que le debe su abuelo. El sobrino de la extorsiva mujer la descubre y la denuncia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias trabajadoras están pensando dos veces antes de salir a su empleo o enviar a los niños a la escuela por temor de ser sorprendidos por las autoridades en la calle o usando el transporte público.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: 'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: A Truth Born of Fragility
programme.desc: A whirlwind of sincerity that an indifferent voice cannot hide. Listen to the most honest confessions delivered by a fragile heart. Between collapsing boundaries and bursting revelations, you will encounter the moment when suppressed emotions finally find their truth.

programme.title: Blurry Moment
programme.desc: A moment when all noise fades and your vision blurs. Submerge yourself in surreal landscapes and calm beats. A mood filled only with your own breath, as light as a state of zero gravity.

programme.desc: Take a moment to breathe and fill your heart with the warm, comforting voices of Girls' Generation that gently embrace your weary days.
